creator: freebsd-announce@chthonic.com
text:
My apologies for omitting this information:

I did try to upgrade the port from a fresh ports tree. I looked at
various mailing list archives, and I did not see a prior bug report
nor fix; and nothing in UPDATING.

I think that is it.

On Thu, Sep 08, 2011 at 03:20:10PM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/160563'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=160563
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       portupgrade of tracker-client fails
> >Arrival-Date:   Thu Sep 08 15:20:09 UTC 2011
